strategy: Hit with Myth (+15% incoming); he only 30% resists Storm, so a Storm wizard can prism or just push through.
Expect a Weakness on a random wizard from his pet. Cleanse it or stack an extra blade so it does not gut your hit.
Bring Triage for the pet's Tingling Poison DoT.
Only 10,640 health and no minions: stack blades and Feint, then one big hit.
cheatNotes: His pet drops a Tingling Poison DoT on a random wizard. Bring Triage or heal the tick.
